description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story pharmacy building with a flat, reddish-tiled roof and cream-colored exterior walls. The front facade prominently displays the name 'Farmacia Guadalajara' in large red letters, with a blue circular logo on the corner. The building features large glass display windows along the front, allowing visibility into the well-lit interior and product shelves. The side and rear walls are solid and darker in color, providing a stark contrast to the lighter front. The main entrance is located at the front, likely a glass sliding or swinging door, integrated with the display windows. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for an urban commercial setting.
description: A modern, single-story pharmacy with a flat red-tiled roof, cream facade, large glass display windows, and prominent 'Farmacia Guadalajara' signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass display windows, and bold 'Farmacia Guadalajara' signage with a blue logo on the corner.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the continuation of the cream facade, signage, and partial visibility of the glass storefront.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid, dark-colored wall with no windows or signage, emphasizing the building's length.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a completely solid, dark wall and the expanse of the flat red-tiled roof, with no windows or signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: Farmacia Guadalajara text and blue circular logo
attribute_entrance_door: glass sliding or swinging door integrated with storefront windows
